name: Acon Optics Communications Inc.
summary: Acon Optics Communications Inc. designs, manufactures, and sells fiber optical components worldwide. It offers connectors, adapters, patch cords, FTTA cables with mesh cover and angled boot, accessories, fiber optic extenders, fiber optic and copper transceivers, and water repellent materials; MPO/MTP solutions; and data center solutions, such as cassette series, panel series, and cable management. The company was founded in 2017 and is based in New Taipei City, Taiwan.
